attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
FDI_REVENUE_TRX_KEY   REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           	           
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  SALES_ORDER_KEY               	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          	
,CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY    PRODUCT_KEY                   	             
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  AR_TRX_KEY                    	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  END_CUSTOMER_KEY              	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          	
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           	           
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    	
,'UNKNOWN' SALES_REP_NUMBER              	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       	
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 	 
,FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    	          
,TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD   DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        	     
,FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD    DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     	        
,'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          	
,'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 	
,CAST ( NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) AR_TRX_DATETIME               	
,'FDI'  REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,'UNKNOWN' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         	
,COALESCE (CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,'=')  DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      	         
,COALESCE(SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLG,'=')    DV_SERVICE_FLG                	           
,'Y' DV_REVENUE_FLG                	
,COALESCE(EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE_USD_AMT,'0.000000')  DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        	  
,EDW_CREATE_USER               	               
,EDW_CREATE_DTM    EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           	                
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               	               
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM    EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           	                
,COALESCE(ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')   BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         	            
,'UNKNOWN'  BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    	
,GL_POSTED_DT  GL_DT                         	                  
,NULL BK_SS_CD                      	
,EXTENDED_QTY  DV_EXTENDED_QTY               	                  
,NULL OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        	
,ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD   ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              	              
,NULL TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  	
,TRANSACTION_DT                	                
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1   RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY	
, COMPANY_CD  BK_COMPANY_CODE               	                    
,'UNK' BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           	
,'N' DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       	
,'N' DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG     	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   	
,CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY  DV_PRODUCT_KEY                	
,'STANDALONE' DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             	
,'UNKNOWN' DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                	
,'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           	
,'N' DV_FMV_FLG                    	
,NULL DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY	
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY	
,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD                   	        	
,'Y' RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,'N' NRS_TRANSITION_FLG           	
,'UNKNOWN' PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID        	
,ACQUISITION_SOURCE_CD  SOURCE_ENTITY_NAME            	         
,REVENUE_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE_CD       REVENUE_CLASSIFICATION	
,CASE WHEN REVENUE_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE_CD in ('Recurring Deferred ','Recurring Non Deferred','Recurring Other') then 'Y' ELSE 'N' END RECURRING_FLG
,CAST (
TRIM(COALESCE(PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)) AS VARCHAR(70)) 
 AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
 REV_CLASF_RULE_NAME AS DV_REV_CLASS_RULE_NAME
,'N' as DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG /* added as part of Q4FY19 PnL Changes*/ 
,'UNKNOWN' AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM REL*/
,'=' AS NET_PRICE_FLG
,-999 WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,'UNKNOWN' BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,-999 DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FDI_REVENUE_TRX_RECURR
WHERE DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_FIN_VW_EDW_FDI_REC_REV_TRX GROUP BY 1)

SELECT 
  BSVC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,
  BSVC.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID ,
  BSVC.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
  BSVC.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,
  BSVC.ITEM_KEY
  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC  BSVC
  WHERE BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID IN (
'TRAINING',
'AS TRANSACTION',
'AS FIXED')
AND DV_PRDT_SUB_GRP_ALLOC_SRC_CD='SPA'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
